commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation delete pod logtail-160 --ignore-not-found --wait=true 2>&1'

sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'echo  | base64 -d > ~/workspace/yanxi/stage2/logtail.yaml && kubectl apply -f ~/workspace/yanxi/stage2/logtail.yaml 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation logs logtail-160 2>&1 | head -200'
